category_sources: source_facts.description says command-line interface to KeePass database files; official SourceForge project categorizes kpcli under Password Managers.
display_name_sources: Official kpcli homepage heading is "kpcli - A command line interface to KeePass database files"; source_facts.name is kpcli.
docs_sources: Official kpcli homepage provides description/download information; official SourceForge wiki is the project documentation area.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project page includes a Code tab for the kpcli project; source_facts.repo is empty, so the official SourceForge code area was selected.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, official kpcli homepage, and official SourceForge project page describe KeePass database access from the command line and list Perl as the programming language.
